title: Two Sum Optimization
description: This O(N²) function will timeout on large inputs. Identify the correct data structure to achieve O(N).
hints: For each x, check if target - x was already seen.

title: Find Duplicates
description: This O(N²) duplicate finder is too slow. Refactor to O(N) using the right data structure.
hints: Track seen elements in a set; add to result on second encounter.
